reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing it and it’s pretty fun. I think the shop cool and the level the designs are cool so it’s generally a great game and I also made a are you too short about it so I’m hoping that if I make a couple more, I can get the YouTuber cosmetic that’s all I have to say.

developer_response.body: Yeah the game is best with friends, but It's still fun alone, but scary!

reviews.review_description: Even though nobody plays this game it’s still amazing!
